goal_text:
You are looking for information in Cambridge.
You are looking for a place to stay. The hotel 'doesn't need to include internet' and should be in the 'north'.
The hotel should be in the type of 'guesthouse'.
Make sure you get 'address'.
You are also looking for a place to dine. The restaurant should serve 'corsica' food and should be 'in the same area as the hotel'.
If there is no such restaurant, how about one that serves 'chinese' food.
Once you find the 'restaurant' you want to book a table for '6 people' at '13:15' on 'tuesday'.
Make sure you get the 'reference number'.
You also want to book a 'taxi' to commute between the two places.
You want to make sure it arrives the restaurant 'by the booked time'.
Make sure you get 'contact number' and 'car type'.Remember. You don't want booking for accomodation. Just get the information and it all done.

book.destination: restaurant that the user will book
book.departure: accommodation that the user will book

message: You are looking for information in Cambridge
You are looking for a place to stay. The hotel doesn't need to include internet and should be in the north
The hotel should be in the type of guesthouse
You are also looking for a place to dine. The restaurant should serve corsica food and should be in the same area as the hotel
If there is no such restaurant, how about one that serves chinese food
Once you find the restaurant you want to book a table for 6 people at 13:15 on tuesday
Make sure you get the reference number
You also want to book a taxi to commute between the two places
You want to make sure it arrives the restaurant by the booked time
Make sure you get contact number and car type
